title: notify_user
description: Send a short outcome / decision-request message to Carsten in his main chat group (auto-routed: Discord priority, WhatsApp if active session). Use BEFORE end_call to report what happened on the call. Use urgency='info' for a successful outcome (✅ task done) or a polite no (❌ counterpart declined). Use urgency='decision' when the counterpart proposed something outside the agreed tolerance and Carsten needs to choose (e.g. restaurant offered 18:00 instead of 20:15) — bot thanks counterpart for the offer, says it must check internally and will get back, then calls notify_user(decision) before end_call(farewell). Use urgency='alert' only for emergencies / threatening counterpart.

text.description: Short outcome line. Format examples — ✅ success: 'Tisch reserviert bei Bella Vista, achtzehn Uhr, 30. April, 2 Personen.'  ❌ declined: 'Bella Vista hat keinen Tisch im Fenster 19:00-21:00 für 30. April.'  ⏸ decision needed: 'Bella Vista bot 18:00 statt 20:15 (außerhalb ±60min). Soll ich annehmen?' Always include the relevant facts (date, time, party size, counterpart name).

urgency.description: info = outcome report (success or polite no). decision = counterpart offered something outside tolerance, Carsten must choose; bot says 'I'll check internally' to counterpart, hangs up, awaits Carsten's reply. alert = emergency / threatening behavior, immediate attention.
